title: Create: Numismatics Crafting
description: Adds crafts to the Create: Numismatics "Coins"
body:
Create: Numismatics Crafting Recipe Mod

Overview: Create: Numismatics Crafting Recipe is a mod designed to expand the crafting mechanics in the Create: Numismatics mod, providing players with a more immersive and detailed crafting experience. This mod introduces new "unpolished" versions of all the coins (Spur, Bevel, Sprocket, Cog, Crown, Sun), adding an extra layer of realism and complexity to the coin production process.

Features:

Unpolished Coins:

Each type of coin (Spur, Bevel, Sprocket, Cog, Crown, Sun) now has an "unpolished" variant.
Crafting these unpolished coins requires the respective ore and a cogwheel.

Crafting Recipes:

Spur Coin: Crafted a using copper nugget and a cogwheel.
Bevel Coin: Crafted a using crushed raw zinc and a cogwheel.
Sprocket Coin: Crafted a using iron plate and a large cogwheel.
Cog Coin: Crafted using a brass ingot and a large cogwheel.
Crown Coin: Crafted using a gold block and a large cogwheel.
Sun Coin: Crafted using a Crown, netherite block and a large cogwheel.

Washing Process:

To transform the unpolished coins into their polished, usable form, they must be washed.
Use an encased fan to wash the unpolished coins, making them ready for use in crafting and trading.

How to Use:

Crafting Unpolished Coins:

Gather the necessary ore and a cogwheel.
Access a mechanical press and combine the ore with the cogwheel to create the unpolished coin of your choice.

Polishing Coins:

Set up an encased fan with a water source.
Place the unpolished coins in front of the encased fan.
Allow the fan to wash the coins until they transform into their polished versions.

Benefits:

Adds depth and realism to the coin production process in Create: Numismatics.
Crafts for multi-player and single-player worlds
Using create's functions to fit in

Compatibility:

Requires the Create: Numismatics & Create mods to be installed.
Fully compatible with other mods that add new types of items like copper nuggets and gold block varients

Experience a richer and more detailed crafting system with Create: Numismatics Crafting Recipe, where every coin tells a story of careful crafting and mechanical ingenuity.
